PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\Bid-Master-System\\logs\\ | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\Bid-Master-System\\progress_log.md | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-List)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Chrome 9222: ALIVE"; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).Browser } catch { Write-Host "Chrome 9222: DOWN — $_" })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); sys.path.insert\(0,'scripts'\); from sheets_client import open_sheet; ws=open_sheet\('1gz7qLDIWphDhqxLf8Pxm08_cPmNb_IXTDvyxm6uThps','pending_award'\); rows=ws.get_all_records\(\); s=['69049351246','69049353012','69049015928','69049005971']; [print\(r['job_id'],'|',r.get\('province',''\),'|',r.get\('title',''\)\) for r in rows if r['job_id'] in s]")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem data\\ | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-2\) } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, Length)

PowerShell($j = Get-Content C:\\Bid-Master-System\\dashboard\\web\\public\\snapshot.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "generated_at: $\($j.generated_at\)"; "daily dates: $\(\($j.daily.PSObject.Properties.Name\) -join ', '\)"; "runs count: $\($j.runs.Count\)"; "commits count: $\($j.commits.Count\)"; "inflections count: $\($j.inflections.Count\)"; "run sample:"; $j.runs[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4)

PowerShell($j = Get-Content C:\\Bid-Master-System\\dashboard\\web\\public\\snapshot.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "--- inflection sample ---"; $j.inflections[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; "--- daily sample ---"; $j.daily.'2026-05-17' | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4)
